classic:
(data, helpers) => { const bgStyle = data.backgroundGradient ? `background: ${data.backgroundGradient};` : ''; return `
${helpers.renderAvatarContainer(data, `
${helpers.renderAvatar(data)}
`)}

CONTACTO

${data.personalInfo.phone?`

Teléfono:
${data.personalInfo.phone}

`:''}${data.personalInfo.email?`

Email:
${data.personalInfo.email}

`:''}${data.personalInfo.address?`

Dirección:
${data.personalInfo.address}

`:''}${data.personalInfo.website?`

Web:
${data.personalInfo.website}

`:''}
${!data.sectionOrder.includes('skills') && data.skills.length>0?`

HABILIDADES

${data.skills.map(s=>`

${s.name} (${helpers.levelLabels[s.level]})

`).join('')}
`:''}

${helpers.getFullName(data.personalInfo)}

${data.personalInfo.title||''}

${helpers.renderOrderedSections(data, 'classic')}
${helpers.renderFooter(data, {color: data.textColorMuted})}
`; }
modern:
(data, helpers) => { const bgStyle = data.backgroundGradient ? `background: ${data.backgroundGradient};` : ''; return `
${helpers.renderAvatarContainer(data, `
${helpers.renderAvatar(data)}
`)}

${helpers.getFullName(data.personalInfo)}

${data.personalInfo.title||''}

${helpers.renderOrderedSections(data, 'modern')}
${!data.sectionOrder.includes('skills') ? helpers.renderGenericSection('Habilidades', data.skills, s => `

${s.name} (${helpers.levelLabels[s.level]})

`, data.themeColor) : ''}
${helpers.renderFooter(data, {color: data.textColorLight, bgColor: data.themeColor, borderColor: data.themeColor})}
`; }
compact:
(data, helpers) => { const bgStyle = data.backgroundGradient ? `background: ${data.backgroundGradient};` : ''; return `
${helpers.renderAvatarContainer(data, `
${helpers.renderAvatar(data)}
`)}

${helpers.getFullName(data.personalInfo)}

${data.personalInfo.title||''}

${data.personalInfo.email?`${helpers.footerIcons.email} ${data.personalInfo.email}`:''}${data.personalInfo.phone?`${helpers.footerIcons.phone} ${data.personalInfo.phone}`:''}${data.personalInfo.website?`${helpers.footerIcons.web} ${data.personalInfo.website}`:''}
${helpers.renderOrderedSections(data, 'compact')}
${!data.sectionOrder.includes('summary') ? helpers.renderGenericSection('Resumen', data.personalInfo.summary ? [{text: data.personalInfo.summary}] : [], item => `

${item.text}

`, data.themeColor) : ''}${!data.sectionOrder.includes('skills') ? helpers.renderGenericSection('Habilidades', data.skills, s => `

${s.name} (${helpers.levelLabels[s.level]})

`, data.themeColor): ''}
${helpers.renderFooter(data, {padding: '1rem', color: data.textColorMuted})}
`; }
executive:
(data, helpers) => { const bgStyle = data.backgroundGradient ? `background: ${data.backgroundGradient};` : ''; return `

${helpers.getFullName(data.personalInfo)}

${data.personalInfo.title||''}

${helpers.renderGenericSection('Resumen', data.personalInfo.summary ? [{text: data.personalInfo.summary}] : [], item => `

${item.text}

`, data.themeColor)}${helpers.renderGenericSection('Experiencia', data.experience, e => helpers.renderExperienceItem(e, data), data.themeColor)}${helpers.renderGenericSection('Educación', data.education, e => helpers.renderEducationItem(e, data), data.themeColor)}${helpers.renderGenericSection('Habilidades', data.skills, s => `${s.name}`, data.themeColor)}
${helpers.renderFooter(data, {color: data.textColorMuted})}
`; }
creative:
(data, helpers) => { const bgStyle = data.backgroundGradient ? `background: ${data.backgroundGradient};` : 'background-color: #f8f9fa;'; return `
${helpers.renderAvatarContainer(data, `
${helpers.renderAvatar(data)}
`)}

${helpers.getFullName(data.personalInfo)}

${data.personalInfo.title||''}

${helpers.renderGenericSection('Resumen', data.personalInfo.summary ? [{text: data.personalInfo.summary}] : [], item => `

${item.text}

`, data.themeColor, 'margin-top:0;')}${helpers.renderGenericSection('Experiencia', data.experience, e => helpers.renderExperienceItem(e, data), data.themeColor)}${helpers.renderGenericSection('Educación', data.education, e => helpers.renderEducationItem(e, data), data.themeColor)}${helpers.renderGenericSection('Habilidades', data.skills, s => `${s.name}`, data.themeColor)}
`; }
minimalist:
(data, helpers) => { const bgStyle = data.backgroundGradient ? `background: ${data.backgroundGradient};` : 'background:white;'; return `

${helpers.getFullName(data.personalInfo)}

${data.personalInfo.title||''}

${data.personalInfo.summary ? `

${data.personalInfo.summary}

`:''}${helpers.renderGenericSection('Experiencia', data.experience, e => `

${helpers.formatExperienceDate(e.startDate,e.endDate,e.current)}

${e.position||''}

${e.company||''}

`, data.themeColor)}${helpers.renderGenericSection('Educación', data.education, e => `

${helpers.formatExperienceDate(e.startDate,e.endDate,e.current)}

${e.degree||''}

${e.institution||''}

`, data.themeColor)}
${helpers.renderFooter(data, {color: data.textColorMuted})}
`; }
corporate:

${helpers.renderFooter(data, {color: data.textColorMuted})}

technical:
(data, helpers) => { const bgStyle = data.backgroundGradient ? `background: ${data.backgroundGradient};` : 'background:#fdfdfd;'; return `

${helpers.getFullName(data.personalInfo)} > ${data.personalInfo.title||'Professional'}

// ${data.personalInfo.email} | ${data.personalInfo.phone} | ${data.personalInfo.website}
${helpers.renderGenericSection('// SUMMARY', data.personalInfo.summary ? [{text: data.personalInfo.summary}] : [], item => `

${item.text}

`, data.themeColor)}${helpers.renderGenericSection('// EXPERIENCE', data.experience, e => helpers.renderExperienceItem(e, data), data.themeColor)}${helpers.renderGenericSection('// EDUCATION', data.education, e => helpers.renderEducationItem(e, data), data.themeColor)}${helpers.renderGenericSection('// SKILLS', data.skills, s => `${s.name}`, data.themeColor)}
${helpers.renderFooter(data, {color: data.textColorMuted})}
`; }
infographic:
(data, helpers) => { const bgStyle = data.backgroundGradient ? `background: ${data.backgroundGradient};` : 'background: white;'; const skillLevelMap = { beginner: 25, intermediate: 50, advanced: 75, expert: 95 }; const timelineItem = (item, color) => `

${helpers.formatExperienceDate(item.startDate, item.endDate, item.current)}

${item.position || item.degree}

${item.company || item.institution}

`; return `
${helpers.renderAvatarContainer(data, `
${helpers.renderAvatar(data)}
`)}

${helpers.getFullName(data.personalInfo)}

${data.personalInfo.title}

${data.personalInfo.summary}

${helpers.renderGenericSection('Experiencia', data.experience, e => timelineItem(e, data.themeColor), data.themeColor)}${helpers.renderGenericSection('Educación', data.education, e => timelineItem(e, data.themeColor), data.themeColor)}${helpers.renderGenericSection('Habilidades', data.skills, s => `

${s.name}

`, data.themeColor)}
`; }
academic:
(data, helpers) => { const bgStyle = data.backgroundGradient ? `background: ${data.backgroundGradient};` : ''; return `

${helpers.getFullName(data.personalInfo)}

${data.personalInfo.address} | ${data.personalInfo.email} | ${data.personalInfo.phone}

${helpers.renderGenericSection('Resumen Profesional', data.personalInfo.summary ? [{text: data.personalInfo.summary}] : [], item => `

${item.text}

`, data.textColorDark)}${helpers.renderGenericSection('Educación', data.education, e => helpers.renderEducationItem(e, data), data.textColorDark)}${helpers.renderGenericSection('Experiencia Profesional', data.experience, e => helpers.renderExperienceItem(e, data), data.textColorDark)}${helpers.renderGenericSection('Habilidades Clave', data.skills, s => `
  • ${s.name} (${helpers.levelLabels[s.level]})
    • `, data.textColorDark).replace('','')}
    ${helpers.renderFooter(data, {color: data.textColorMuted})}
    `; }
visionary:
(data, helpers) => { const bgStyle = data.backgroundGradient ? `background: ${data.backgroundGradient}; color: ${data.textColorDark}; text-shadow: none;` : `color:${data.textColorLight}; text-shadow:1px 1px 3px #000; background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.6), rgba(0,0,0,0.6)), url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1554141542-095a854335b6?q=80&w=2070'); background-size:cover; background-position:center;`; return `

${helpers.getFullName(data.personalInfo)}

${data.personalInfo.title}

${helpers.renderGenericSection('Resumen', data.personalInfo.summary ? [{text: data.personalInfo.summary}] : [], item => `

`, data.themeColor)}${helpers.renderGenericSection('Experiencia', data.experience, e => helpers.renderExperienceItem(e, data), data.themeColor)}${helpers.renderGenericSection('Educación', data.education, e => helpers.renderEducationItem(e, data), data.themeColor)}
${helpers.renderFooter(data, data.backgroundGradient ? {color:data.textColorMuted, bgColor:'transparent', borderColor:data.themeColor} : {color:data.textColorLight, bgColor:'transparent', borderColor:data.themeColor})}
`; }

`; }

chronological:

${helpers.getFullName(data.personalInfo)}

${data.personalInfo.title}

${[...data.experience, ...data.education].sort((a,b) => new Date(b.startDate) - new Date(a.startDate)).map((item, i) => `

${item.position || item.degree}

${item.company || item.institution}

${helpers.formatExperienceDate(item.startDate, item.endDate, item.current)}

`).join('')}
`; }

gradient:
(data, helpers) => { const bgStyle = data.backgroundGradient ? `background: ${data.backgroundGradient};` : 'background: white;'; const sidebarGradient = `linear-gradient(145deg, ${data.themeColor}, color-mix(in srgb, ${data.themeColor} 60%, #000))`; return `

bold:

Teléfono

`:''}`, data.themeColor)}${!data.sectionOrder.includes('skills') ? helpers.renderGenericSection('Habilidades', data.skills, s => `

${s.name}

cards:
(data, helpers) => { const bgStyle = data.backgroundGradient ? `background: ${data.backgroundGradient};` : 'background: #f0f2f5;'; const cardStyle = 'background:white; border-radius:8px; padding:1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); margin-bottom:1.5rem;'; return `
${helpers.renderAvatarContainer(data, `
${helpers.renderAvatar(data)}
`)}

${helpers.getFullName(data.personalInfo)}

${data.personalInfo.title}

${data.sectionOrder.map(key => { const sectionMap = { summary: { title: 'Resumen', content: helpers.renderGenericSection('', data.personalInfo.summary ? [{text: data.personalInfo.summary}] : [], item => `

${item.text}

`, data.themeColor) }, experience: { title: 'Experiencia', content: helpers.renderGenericSection('', data.experience, e => helpers.renderExperienceItem(e, data), data.themeColor) }, education: { title: 'Educación', content: helpers.renderGenericSection('', data.education, e => helpers.renderEducationItem(e, data), data.themeColor) }, skills: { title: 'Habilidades', content: helpers.renderGenericSection('', data.skills, s => `${s.name}`, data.themeColor) }, impacts: { title: 'Impacto Clave', content: helpers.renderGenericSection('', data.impacts, item => `
${item.description}
`, data.themeColor) }, portfolio: { title: 'Portafolio', content: helpers.renderGenericSection('', data.portfolio, item => `

${item.title}

`, data.themeColor, 'column-count:3; column-gap:1rem;') } }; const section = sectionMap[key]; if (!section || !section.content) return ''; return `

${section.title}

${section.content.replace(/
.*?<\/h3>/, '').replace(/<\/div>$/, '')}
`; }).join('')}
`; }

${helpers.getFullName(data.personalInfo)}
